trigger_condition.note: optimal_f = 0.325 after win; optimal_f = 0.175 after loss

sizing_rule.note: Position size = Biggest Loss / Optimal f. Optimal f is 0.325 after winning trade and 0.175 after losing trade. This adapts the kelly-style optimal f calculation based on trade history to control variance.

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined by dividing the biggest loss by the optimal f value, adjusted for whether the previous trade was a win or loss, to achieve optimal growth across multiple trades.
